name: Apple Meringue Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the apples evenly in the bottom of the pie shell.
2. In a separate bowl, cream together the sugar and butter. Blend in the lemon juice and 3 beaten egg yolks.
3. Pour the mixture over the apple. Sprinkle with cinnamon and nutmeg.
4. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 40 to 45 minutes.
5. Beat egg whites until peaks form. Gradually add powdered sugar and vanilla, beating until meringue is stiff.
6. Spread the meringue over the top of the pie.
7. Return the pie to the oven. Reduce heat to 325 degrees.
8. Bake for 5 to 10 minutes longer, until the meringue is lightly browned.
